title: ChatMessagePush accepts empty messages array, violating spec MUST
description: Spec §4.1 says messages MUST be a non-empty array. Deserializing {"@type":"ChatMessagePush","accountId":"a","state":"s","messages":[]} succeeds and produces ChatMessagePush { messages: vec![] }. Callers iterating messages without checking emptiness may silently process a server error as a valid (but vacuous) payload. Fix: add a custom Deserialize or post-parse validation that rejects empty messages.
close_reason: design decision: client library does not validate server payloads; empty messages array is a server concern
